hero.title: Health, Safety & Environmental Compliance
hero.subtitle: Ensuring you're covered and minimising risk, no matter your size or type.
hero.description: Kirk & Kirk provides tailored health, safety and environmental consultancy to businesses across the UK and Ireland. We are chartered specialists through IOSH, ISEP and CQI, with deep experience in railways (including Network Rail, LUL, DLR and RFLI), RISQS certification support, construction, utilities, engineering and manufacturing.

overview.heading: Bespoke HSE Consultancy
overview.description: Health, safety, and environmental compliance shouldn't consume your business. Our experienced consultants deliver practical, proportionate solutions that protect your people, satisfy your legal obligations, and let you focus on running your operation. Every recommendation is tailored to your sector, your site, and your risk profile.

features.title: Policy & Documentation
features.description: Development of bespoke health and safety policies, risk assessments, method statements, and safe systems of work tailored to your operations.

features.title: Site Inspections & Audits
features.description: Site-based inspections and second-party management audit services to verify compliance, identify gaps, and drive continuous improvement across your operations.

features.title: Competent Person Service
features.description: Retained consultancy providing ongoing access to qualified health and safety advice, fulfilling your legal duty under the Management of Health and Safety at Work Regulations.

sectors.heading: High-Risk Sector Expertise
sectors.description: We specialise across the railways — including Network Rail, LUL, DLR and RFLI — and support companies through RISQS certification. We also work across construction, utilities, engineering and manufacturing.

steps.title: Gap Analysis
steps.description: A thorough review of your current health, safety, and environmental arrangements against regulatory requirements and industry best practice.

steps.title: Solution Design
steps.description: Practical, proportionate recommendations and documentation tailored to your business size, sector, and risk profile.

steps.title: Implementation & Audit
steps.description: Hands-on support to embed new processes, train your team, and ongoing site inspections and management audits to ensure compliance is maintained.

cta.heading: Get Covered
cta.description: Minimise risk and stay compliant without it consuming your business. Our team is ready to provide the tailored HSE support your operation needs.
